description: Alice updates two existing events: moves the Tuesday client call from 10 AM to 11 AM, and changes the Friday team lunch location from Ground Floor Café to Skyline Room.

events.title: Client Call
events.reasoning: Alice moves the Tuesday client call from 10 AM to 11 AM. Duration preserved. Matches calendar event [1].
events.assumptions: Duration preserved as 1 hour from the original event.

events.title: Team Lunch
events.reasoning: Alice changes the Friday team lunch location from Ground Floor Café to Skyline Room. Time unchanged. Matches calendar event [2].
events.assumptions: Only the location changes; time and duration preserved.

mock_llm_response.summary: Two updates: client call moved to 11 AM Tuesday, team lunch location changed to Skyline Room Friday.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday). Tuesday = 2026-02-24, Friday = 2026-02-27. Client Call is calendar_context[0] so existing_event_id=1. Team Lunch is calendar_context[1] so existing_event_id=2.
